prerequisites: An active monday.com account whose data you want to replicate. The credentials used inherit the permission levels set for that user in the monday.com UI.
Credentials supplied via the `credentials` config field: either a personal API token or OAuth app credentials (client_id and client_secret).
Optionally, the specific `board_ids` you want to sync. If left empty, all accessible boards are read.
Optionally, `num_workers` to control the number of concurrent workers used during extraction.

authMethods.name: Personal API Token
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a personal API token, supplied as `credentials.api_token` (or `credentials.access_token`). Generate it from your profile picture > Developers > API token > Show, or, for account admins, under profile picture > Administration > Connections > Personal API token. The token uses the permission levels of your monday.com user and is sent directly as the value of the `Authorization` header (no Bearer prefix). Regenerating a token immediately invalidates the previous one.

authMethods.name: OAuth
authMethods.summary: Authenticate via the monday.com OAuth flow using `credentials.client_id` and `credentials.client_secret` from a monday.com app. Find the client_id and client_secret in the app's Basic Information tab of the Developer Center. Your backend exchanges the authorization code for an access token (a bearer token) by POSTing it to the token endpoint at https://auth.monday.com/oauth2/token; that token is then used as `credentials.access_token` for API calls.

setupSteps.title: Choose an authentication method
setupSteps.body: Decide between a personal API token (tied to one user's permissions) and OAuth (client_id/client_secret for an installed monday.com app). The connector accepts either through the `credentials` config field.

setupSteps.title: Generate a personal API token
setupSteps.body: If using a personal token, open monday.com, click your profile picture, then Developers > API token > Show to reveal your token. Account admins can alternatively find it under profile picture > Administration > Connections > Personal API token. Copy the token and provide it as `credentials.api_token` (or `credentials.access_token`).

setupSteps.title: Or register an app for OAuth
setupSteps.body: If using OAuth, create an app in the monday.com Developer Center and copy the `client_id` and `client_secret` from the app's Basic Information tab. Complete the OAuth flow to exchange the authorization code for a bearer access token, then supply `credentials.client_id`, `credentials.client_secret`, and the resulting `credentials.access_token`.

setupSteps.title: Select boards and configure workers
setupSteps.body: Optionally set `board_ids` to limit replication to specific boards; leave it empty to read all boards the credentials can access. Optionally set `num_workers` to tune extraction concurrency, then save and run the connection to validate the credentials against the monday.com API at https://api.monday.com/v2.
